    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_contrib_conv2d_winograd_without_weight_transform_add_nn_relu(p0: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((6, 6, 64, 64), "float32"), p2: T.Buffer((1, 1, 1, 64), "float32"), T_relu: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32")):

            data_pack_1[blockIdx_x * 32 + threadIdx_x] = T.float32(0)

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_conv2d(p0: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1, 1, 64, 64), "float32"), conv2d_nhwc: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "185718651c702d37", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 28)

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_conv2d_1(p0: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1, 1, 64, 128), "float32"), conv2d_nhwc: T.Buffer((1, 28, 28, 128), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "e4dd61de26ec15a2", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 28)
        conv2d_nhwc_local = T.allocate([4], "float32", "local")
        pad_temp_shared = T.allocate([2640], "float32", "shared")
        p1_shared = T.allocate([1024], "float32", "shared")
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 896)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1 = T.Buffer((4,), data=conv2d_nhwc_local, scope="local", align=8)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1[0] = T.float32(0)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1[2] = T.float32(0)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1[1] = T.float32(0)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1[3] = T.float32(0)
        threadIdx_x_1 = T.env_thread("threadIdx.x")
        pad_temp_shared_1 = T.Buffer((2640,), data=pad_temp_shared, scope="shared")
        p0_1 = T.Buffer((200704,), data=p0.data)
        with T.launch_thread(threadIdx_x_1, 896):
            pad_temp_shared_1[threadIdx_x_1 * 2:threadIdx_x_1 * 2 + 2] = p0_1[blockIdx_x // 2 * 14336 + threadIdx_x_1 // 440 * 3584 + threadIdx_x_1 % 440 // 8 * 64 + threadIdx_x_1 % 8 * 2:blockIdx_x // 2 * 14336 + threadIdx_x_1 // 440 * 3584 + threadIdx_x_1 % 440 // 8 * 64 + threadIdx_x_1 % 8 * 2 + 2]
        with T.launch_thread(threadIdx_x_1, 896):
            if threadIdx_x_1 < 424:

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_conv2d_2(p0: T.Buffer((1, 28, 28, 128), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1, 1, 128, 256), "float32"), conv2d_nhwc: T.Buffer((1, 14, 14, 256), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "09ad5e92867a0861", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 1568)
        conv2d_nhwc_local = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        pad_temp_shared = T.allocate([96], "float32", "shared")
        p1_shared = T.allocate([512], "float32", "shared")
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1 = T.Buffer((1,), data=conv2d_nhwc_local, scope="local", align=4)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1[0] = T.float32(0)
        for rc_outer_outer in range(4):
            pad_temp_shared_1 = T.Buffer((96,), data=pad_temp_shared, scope="shared")
            for ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer in range(3):
                threadIdx_x_1 = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
                p0_1 = T.Buffer((100352,), data=p0.data)
                pad_temp_shared_1[ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x_1] = p0_1[blockIdx_x // 112 * 7168 + blockIdx_x % 112 // 16 * 512 + ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 128 + rc_outer_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x_1]
            p1_shared_1 = T.Buffer((512,), data=p1_shared, scope="shared")
            for ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer in range(16):
                threadIdx_x_1 = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
                p1_1 = T.Buffer((32768,), data=p1.data)

            for rc_inner in range(32):
                conv2d_nhwc_local_1[0] = conv2d_nhwc_local_1[0] + pad_temp_shared_1[threadIdx_x // 16 * 64 + rc_inner] * p1_shared_1[rc_inner * 16 + threadIdx_x % 16]
        conv2d_nhwc_1 = T.Buffer((50176,), data=conv2d_nhwc.data)
        conv2d_nhwc_1[blockIdx_x // 16 * 512 + threadIdx_x // 16 * 256 + blockIdx_x % 16 * 16 + threadIdx_x % 16] = conv2d_nhwc_local_1[0]

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_conv2d_3(p0: T.Buffer((1, 14, 14, 256), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1, 1, 256, 512), "float32"), conv2d_nhwc: T.Buffer((1, 7, 7, 512), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "19b34fdd46cafdcc", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 56)
        conv2d_nhwc_local = T.allocate([14], "float32", "local")
        pad_temp_shared = T.allocate([416], "float32", "shared")
        p1_shared = T.allocate([2048], "float32", "shared")
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
        conv2d_nhwc_local_1 = T.Buffer((49,), data=conv2d_nhwc_local, scope="local", align=16)
        for xx_c_inner_init in range(7):
            conv2d_nhwc_local_1[xx_c_inner_init] = T.float32(0)
            conv2d_nhwc_local_1[xx_c_inner_init + 7] = T.float32(0)
        for rc_outer_outer in range(8):
            pad_temp_shared_1 = T.Buffer((416,), data=pad_temp_shared, scope="shared")
            for ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer in range(7):
                threadIdx_x_1 = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
                if ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 2 + threadIdx_x_1 // 16 < 13:

                    pad_temp_shared_1[ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 64 + threadIdx_x_1 * 2:ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 64 + threadIdx_x_1 * 2 + 2] = p0_1[blockIdx_x // 8 * 7168 + ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 512 + threadIdx_x_1 // 16 * 256 + rc_outer_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x_1 % 16 * 2:blockIdx_x // 8 * 7168 + ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 512 + threadIdx_x_1 // 16 * 256 + rc_outer_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x_1 % 16 * 2 + 2]
            p1_shared_1 = T.Buffer((2048,), data=p1_shared, scope="shared")
            for ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer in range(64):
                threadIdx_x_1 = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
                p1_1 = T.Buffer((131072,), data=p1.data)
                p1_shared_1[ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x_1] = p1_1[rc_outer_outer * 16384 + ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer // 2 * 512 + blockIdx_x % 8 * 64 + ax0_ax1_fused_ax2_fused_ax3_fused_outer_outer % 2 * 32 + threadIdx_x_1]
            for rc_outer_inner, xx_c_inner in T.grid(32, 7):

                cse_var_1: T.int32 = xx_c_inner * 64 + rc_outer_inner

        for xx_inner in range(7):
            conv2d_nhwc_1 = T.Buffer((25088,), data=conv2d_nhwc.data)
            conv2d_nhwc_1[blockIdx_x // 8 * 3584 + xx_inner * 512 + blockIdx_x % 8 * 64 + threadIdx_x] = conv2d_nhwc_local_1[xx_inner]
            conv2d_nhwc_1[blockIdx_x // 8 * 3584 + xx_inner * 512 + blockIdx_x % 8 * 64 + threadIdx_x + 32] = conv2d_nhwc_local_1[xx_inner + 7]

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_dense_add(p0: T.Buffer((1, 512), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1000, 512), "float32"), p2: T.Buffer((1, 1000), "float32"), T_add: T.Buffer((1, 1000), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "d892b410ed994906", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 10)
        T_matmul_NT = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        p0_shared = T.allocate([8], "float32", "shared")
        p1_shared = T.allocate([800], "float32", "shared")
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 100)
        T_matmul_NT_1 = T.Buffer((1,), data=T_matmul_NT, scope="local", align=4)
        T_matmul_NT_1[0] = T.float32(0)
        for k_outer_outer in range(64):
            p0_shared_1 = T.Buffer((8,), data=p0_shared, scope="shared", align=32)
            with T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 100) as threadIdx_x_1:
                if threadIdx_x_1 < 8:
                    p0_1 = T.Buffer((512,), data=p0.data)
                    p0_shared_1[threadIdx_x_1] = p0_1[k_outer_outer * 8 + threadIdx_x_1]
            p1_shared_1 = T.Buffer((800,), data=p1_shared, scope="shared")
            for ax0_ax1_fused_outer_outer in range(4):
                threadIdx_x_1 = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 100)
                p1_1 = T.Buffer((512000,), data=p1.data)
                p1_shared_1[ax0_ax1_fused_outer_outer * 200 + threadIdx_x_1 * 2:ax0_ax1_fused_outer_outer * 200 + threadIdx_x_1 * 2 + 2] = p1_1[blockIdx_x * 51200 + ax0_ax1_fused_outer_outer * 12800 + threadIdx_x_1 // 4 * 512 + k_outer_outer * 8 + threadIdx_x_1 % 4 * 2:blockIdx_x * 51200 + ax0_ax1_fused_outer_outer * 12800 + threadIdx_x_1 // 4 * 512 + k_outer_outer * 8 + threadIdx_x_1 % 4 * 2 + 2]
            for k_inner in range(8):
                T_matmul_NT_1[0] = T_matmul_NT_1[0] + p0_shared_1[k_inner] * p1_shared_1[threadIdx_x * 8 + k_inner]
        T_add_1 = T.Buffer((1000,), data=T_add.data)
        p2_1 = T.Buffer((1000,), data=p2.data)
        T_add_1[blockIdx_x * 100 + threadIdx_x] = T_matmul_NT_1[0] + p2_1[blockIdx_x * 100 + threadIdx_x]

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_global_avg_pool2d(p0: T.Buffer((1, 7, 7, 512), "float32"), adaptive_pool_avg: T.Buffer((1, 1, 1, 512), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "e4c9334ac8c92865", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        adaptive_pool_sum = T.allocate([512], "float32", "global")
        adaptive_pool_sum_1 = T.Buffer((512,), data=adaptive_pool_sum)
        with T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 16) as blockIdx_x:
            threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
            adaptive_pool_sum_1[blockIdx_x * 32 + threadIdx_x] = T.float32(0)
            for rv0, rv1 in T.grid(7, 7):
                p0_1 = T.Buffer((25088,), data=p0.data)
                adaptive_pool_sum_1[blockIdx_x * 32 + threadIdx_x] = adaptive_pool_sum_1[blockIdx_x * 32 + threadIdx_x] + p0_1[rv0 * 3584 + rv1 * 512 + blockIdx_x * 32 + threadIdx_x]
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 128)
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 4)
        adaptive_pool_avg_1 = T.Buffer((512,), data=adaptive_pool_avg.data)
        adaptive_pool_avg_1[blockIdx_x * 4 + threadIdx_x] = adaptive_pool_sum_1[blockIdx_x * 4 + threadIdx_x] * T.float32(0.020408163265306121)

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_max_pool2d_add_nn_relu(p0: T.Buffer((1, 112, 112, 64), "float32"), p1: T.Buffer((1, 1, 1, 64), "float32"), T_relu: T.Buffer((1, 56, 56, 64), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "1c90587e262a1e01", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        pool_max = T.allocate([200704], "float32", "global")
        pool_max_1 = T.Buffer((200704,), data=pool_max)
        with T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 3136) as blockIdx_x:
            threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 64)
            pool_max_1[blockIdx_x * 64 + threadIdx_x] = T.float32(-3.4028234663852886e+38)
            for rv0, rv1 in T.grid(3, 3):
                p0_1 = T.Buffer((802816,), data=p0.data)
                pool_max_1[blockIdx_x * 64 + threadIdx_x] = T.max(pool_max_1[blockIdx_x * 64 + threadIdx_x], T.if_then_else(1 <= blockIdx_x // 56 * 2 + rv0 and 1 <= blockIdx_x % 56 * 2 + rv1, p0_1[blockIdx_x // 56 * 14336 + rv0 * 7168 + blockIdx_x % 56 * 128 + rv1 * 64 + threadIdx_x - 7232], T.float32(-3.4028234663852886e+38)))
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 3136)
        threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 64)
        T_relu_1 = T.Buffer((200704,), data=T_relu.data)
        p1_1 = T.Buffer((64,), data=p1.data)
        T_relu_1[blockIdx_x * 64 + threadIdx_x] = T.max(pool_max_1[blockIdx_x * 64 + threadIdx_x] + p1_1[threadIdx_x], T.float32(0))

    @T.prim_func
    def tvmgen_default_fused_nn_softmax(p0: T.Buffer((1, 1000), "float32"), T_softmax_norm: T.Buffer((1, 1000), "float32")):
        T.func_attr({"from_legacy_te_schedule": T.bool(True), "hash": "65d167682acf2126", "target": T.target({"arch": "sm_86", "host": {"keys": ["cpu"], "kind": "llvm", "tag": ""}, "keys": ["cuda", "gpu"], "kind": "cuda", "max_num_threads": 1024, "tag": "", "thread_warp_size": 32}), "tir.noalias": T.bool(True)})
        blockIdx_x = T.launch_thread("blockIdx.x", 1)
        normal_reduce_temp0 = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        reduce_temp0 = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        T_softmax_maxelem = T.allocate([1], "float32", "shared")
        normal_reduce_temp0_1 = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        reduce_temp0_1 = T.allocate([1], "float32", "local")
        T_softmax_expsum = T.allocate([1], "float32", "shared")
        p0_1 = T.Buffer((1000,), data=p0.data)
        T_softmax_maxelem_1 = T.Buffer((1,), data=T_softmax_maxelem, scope="shared", align=4)
        with T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32) as threadIdx_x:
            normal_reduce_temp0_2 = T.Buffer((1,), data=normal_reduce_temp0, scope="local")
            normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] = T.float32(-3.4028234663852886e+38)
            for k_outer in range(32):
                if k_outer * 4 + threadIdx_x // 8 < 125:
                    normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] = T.max(normal_reduce_temp0_2[0], p0_1[k_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x])
            reduce_temp0_2 = T.Buffer((1,), data=reduce_temp0, scope="local")

                T.tvm_thread_allreduce(T.uint32(1), normal_reduce_temp0_2[0], T.bool(True), reduce_temp0_2[0], threadIdx_x)
            if threadIdx_x == 0:
                T_softmax_maxelem_1[0] = reduce_temp0_2[0]
        T_softmax_expsum_1 = T.Buffer((1,), data=T_softmax_expsum, scope="shared", align=4)

            normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] = normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] + T.exp(p0_1[threadIdx_x + 960] - T_softmax_maxelem_1[0])
            if threadIdx_x < 8:
                normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] = normal_reduce_temp0_2[0] + T.exp(p0_1[threadIdx_x + 992] - T_softmax_maxelem_1[0])
            reduce_temp0_2 = T.Buffer((1,), data=reduce_temp0_1, scope="local")
            with T.attr(T.comm_reducer(lambda x, y: x + y, [T.float32(0)]), "reduce_scope", T.reinterpret("handle", T.uint64(0))):
                T.tvm_thread_allreduce(T.uint32(1), normal_reduce_temp0_2[0], T.bool(True), reduce_temp0_2[0], threadIdx_x)
            if threadIdx_x == 0:
                T_softmax_expsum_1[0] = reduce_temp0_2[0]
        for i1_outer in range(32):
            threadIdx_x = T.launch_thread("threadIdx.x", 32)
            if i1_outer * 4 + threadIdx_x // 8 < 125:
                T_softmax_norm_1 = T.Buffer((1000,), data=T_softmax_norm.data)
                T_softmax_norm_1[i1_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x] = T.exp(p0_1[i1_outer * 32 + threadIdx_x] - T_softmax_maxelem_1[0]) / T_softmax_expsum_1[0]

# Metadata omitted. Use show_meta=True in script() method to show it.}
